varieties.name: Podocarpus elatus 'Wild Type' (Queensland Provenance) 🏆 🌱
varieties.origin: Native to Queensland and northern NSW rainforests; naturally occurring throughout Brisbane region
varieties.traits: 30-36m potential height in wild, 10-15m typical in cultivation; straight trunk up to 1.5m diameter; dense dark green canopy; fissured brown bark
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate to high productivity on mature female trees (10+ years); fruit drops when fully ripe
varieties.growing_notes: Excellent natural disease resistance; few pest issues; adapted to local pathogens

varieties.name: Podocarpus elatus 'Female Selection' 🏆 🌱
varieties.origin: Queensland/Brisbane local seed sources; selected for fruiting
varieties.traits: Produces edible fruit receptacles; same growth characteristics as wild type; typically 10-15m in cultivation
varieties.yield_notes: Moderate to high; productivity increases with age; requires cross-pollination from male tree
varieties.availability: Available at IndigiGrow (La Perouse Nursery NSW), Brisbane native plant nurseries. Often labeled 'Female' to distinguish from male plants.

varieties.name: Podocarpus elatus 'Male Selection' 🏆 🌱
varieties.origin: Queensland/Brisbane local seed sources; selected for pollen production
varieties.traits: Produces male pollen cones 2-3cm long; narrowly cylindrical catkin-like structures; same vegetative growth as wild type
varieties.availability: Available at Brisbane native nurseries; essential companion to female trees for fruit production

varieties.name: Podocarpus elatus 'Ornamental/Street Tree Selection'
varieties.origin: Selected from Queensland/Brisbane populations for landscaping use
varieties.traits: Attractive dense conical crown; shiny narrow dark green leaves; used extensively as street tree in Brisbane and Sydney; grows 5-10m in urban conditions
varieties.availability: Widely available at Brisbane and Queensland nurseries for landscaping; often sold in larger 200mm pots

varieties.name: Podocarpus elatus 'Compact/Container Selection'
varieties.traits: Naturally slower growing; denser branching; can be maintained at 2-5m with pruning; suitable for large pots
varieties.yield_notes: Lower fruit production due to size; suitable for ornamental use with occasional fruit
varieties.availability: NOT AVAILABLE in India; would require importation from Australia
